visual_description: A young child with light brown hair, wearing a red and green striped sweater, stands in a snowy landscape at night, looking up with their mouth open. The scene then cuts to a man with dark, medium-length hair, seen from behind, walking through a doorway into a room. He is wearing a dark red shirt and jeans and is carrying a large wooden mallet over his right shoulder.
audio_description: A loud, high-pitched, and sustained electronic tone, similar to a siren or alarm, is audible throughout the clip.
